home.title: Photography is capturing moments, preserving memories, telling stories.
home.seo_description: Explore the photography portfolio of Oscar Durán, specializing in documentary, architectural, and landscape photography.

about.title: About me
about.p1: Hi! I'm Oscar Duran, a photographer passionate about capturing beauty in everyday details. My journey in photography began over a decade ago, and since then, I haven't stopped exploring the world through my lens.
about.p2: I specialize in street, documentary and architectural photography, always seeking the story hidden behind each scene. I believe a good photograph not only shows what something looks like, but how it feels.
about.p3: This portfolio is a collection of moments that have moved me, and I hope they inspire you too.
about.seo_description: Learn more about Oscar Durán, his journey in photography, and his artistic vision.
